name: 🎤 字幕生成
description: 语音转文字 → SRT 格式化 → 字幕统计

steps.label: Whisper 语音识别
steps.task:
# Step 1: Run Whisper speech-to-text
# Edit these values to match your needs:
INPUT="input.mp3"         # Your audio/video file
MODEL="base"              # Model size: tiny, base, small, medium, large
LANG="auto"               # Language: zh, en, ja, or auto for detection
FMT="srt"                 # Output format: srt, vtt, txt, tsv, json

whisper "$INPUT" --model $MODEL --language $LANG --output_format $FMT 2>&1
echo ""
echo "✅ 转录完成"

steps.label: 字幕统计与格式化
steps.task:
# Step 2: View subtitle stats and preview
# Edit the filename to match the whisper output:
INPUT="input.mp3"
SRT_FILE="${INPUT%.*}.srt"

echo "===== 字幕统计 ====="
echo ""
if [ -f "$SRT_FILE" ]; then
  TOTAL_LINES=$(wc -l < "$SRT_FILE")
  echo "📄 文件: $SRT_FILE"
  echo "行数: $TOTAL_LINES 行"
  # Count subtitle entries (sequential numbers)
  ENTRIES=$(grep -c '^[0-9][0-9]*$' "$SRT_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
  echo "字幕条数: $ENTRIES"
  DURATION=$(tail -n +2 "$SRT_FILE" | grep '-->' | tail -1 | awk '{print $3}')
  if [ -n "$DURATION" ]; then
    echo "总时长: $DURATION"
  fi
  echo ""
  echo "===== 内容预览 (前 15 条字幕) ====="
  head -60 "$SRT_FILE"
  if [ "$TOTAL_LINES" -gt 60 ]; then
    echo "..."
    echo "(共 $TOTAL_LINES 行，仅显示前 60 行)"
  fi
else
  echo "⚠ 未找到字幕文件: $SRT_FILE"
  echo "请检查 whisper 输出中生成的实际文件名"
  ls *.srt *.vtt *.txt *.tsv 2>/dev/null || echo "(无字幕文件)"
fi
